{{Quote|He took control during a coup last year. Killed most of the Loyalists in the Jabiimi congress. Fortunately, a few of us escaped.|Orliss Gillmunn|<ref name="Republic 55">[[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]]</ref>}}
The '''Jabiim Congress''',<ref name="HNN 14:7:02" /> also known as the '''Jabiim Council''',<ref name="GaW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref> was the primary governmental body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] that supported the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="CSWE" />

At some point, a [[Jabiimi]]te [[Spokesbeing]] Alto Stratus [[Political coup on Jabiim|executed]] almost all of the Congressional [[Jabiimi Loyalists]]. [[Orliss Gillmunn]] was one of the few to escape.<ref name="Republic 55" /> Later, Stratus made a speech to the Jabiim Congress that rebuffed appeals from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the [[Caucus Chambers]]. The speech was later recorded in a [[HoloNet News Core Edition]] report on the situation on [[Handooine/Legends|Handooine]] and Jabiim.<ref name="HNN 14:7:02" /> After the Clone Wars ended, the congress splintered.<ref name="CSWE" />
